profile.innate_zh: 思维严谨、学术品味高、要求严格
profile.learned_zh: 三十年学术生涯形成的行业洞察力和人脉网络
profile.learned_en: 30 years of field insight and networks
profile.belief_en: If you do academia, do it to the extreme
profile.goal_zh: 团队3年内产出2篇顶刊论文
profile.goal_en: Two top-tier journal papers in 3 years
profile.contradiction_zh: 追求高标准 vs 学生们承受不住压力
profile.contradiction_en: Demands high standards vs. students can't handle the pressure
profile.deep_zh: 其实很关心学生，只是不善表达
profile.deep_en: Cares about students, just doesn't express it
profile.fear_zh: 退休时发现自己没有培养出真正优秀的人
profile.fear_en: Retiring without having trained truly excellent people
profile.lifestyle_zh: 极度规律·几十年如一日
profile.rhythm_zh: 清晨读论文，上午开会，下午指导，晚上写文章
profile.rhythm_en: Papers at dawn, meetings AM, advising PM, writing PM
profile.long_desire_zh: 推进团队最新的研究方向
profile.long_desire_en: Advance the team's newest research direction
profile.short_goal_zh: 审阅学生提交的论文初稿
profile.constraint_zh: 行政事务占用大量时间；经费审批流程繁琐
profile.bias_zh: 倾向用自己当年的标准要求现在的学生
profile.bias_en: Measures today's students by his own era's standards
profile.narrative_zh: 我对你们严格，是因为外面的世界更严格
profile.narrative_en: I'm strict because the outside world is stricter
